system.descriptor: Medicae is the skill of treating injuries, curing diseases, and performing surgery using Imperial medical knowledge and equipment.
system.uses:
Uses: Treating wounds, curing diseases and poisons, performing surgery, diagnosing ailments.
Special Use: First Aid: As a Full Action, make a Medicae test to heal 1d5 Wounds on a lightly damaged patient (not Critically Wounded). Can only attempt First Aid once per injury.
Special Use: Extended Care: With proper facilities and supplies, a Medicae test during rest periods can double natural healing rates.
Special Use: Chem-Use: Medicae can be used to identify drugs, toxins, and chemicals, and to synthesise basic medicinal compounds.

description.value: Medicae is the skill of treating injuries, curing diseases, and performing surgery using Imperial medical knowledge and equipment.
